memoryArtifacts.headline: My 21st great grandmother. Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd

popularStory.headline: Wikipedia story
popularStory.description: Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd (Gwenllian, daughter of Gruffydd, c. 1100 – 1136) was Princess consort of Deheubarth in Wales, and married to Gruffydd ap Rhys, Prince of Deheubarth. Gwenllian was the daughte …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd於1100年出生在威爾士時，她的父親King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys45歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain35歲。她於1123年與Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1136年登記服兵役。她去世於1136年在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd于1100年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys45岁，母亲Angharad ferch Owain35岁。她于1123年与Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1136年登记服兵役。她去世于1136年在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd was born in 1100, in Wales, her father, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, was 45 and her mother, Angharad ferch Owain, was 35. She married Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth in 1123. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She registered for military service in 1136. She died in 1136, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd est née en 1100, à Galles, son père, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth en 1123. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1136. Elle est décédée en 1136, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd 1100 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys 45 und ihre Mutter Angharad ferch Owain 35. Sie hat 1123 Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie hat sich 1136 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Sie starb 1136 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd è nata il nel 1100 nel Galles, sua padre, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Angharad ferch Owain, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth nel 1123. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Lei arruolato nell'esercito nel 1136. Morì nel 1136, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Gruffyddが1100年にウェールズで生まれた時，父King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysは45歳，母Angharad ferch Owainは35歳であった。1123年にGruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1136年に兵役登録をした。彼女は1136年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd(이)가 1100년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1123년 Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그녀는 1136년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd nasceu em 1100, em Gales, seu pai, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Owain, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth em 1123. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela alistou-se no serviço militar em 1136. Ela faleceu em 1136, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd родилась в 1100 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth в 1123 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1136 году она поступила на военную службу. Она умерла в 1136 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd nació en 1100, en Gales, su papá, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth en 1123. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1136. Murió en 1136, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 36 años.
